title: Security Policy
_notice: PLACEHOLDER — Replace with your own security policy before launching.
intro: We take the security of your data seriously. This document outlines our security practices and how to report vulnerabilities.
section1_desc: All sensitive data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3. Encryption keys are managed via KMS with automatic rotation.
section2_desc: We enforce role-based access control (RBAC). Administrative actions are logged in an audit trail. Access to production data requires multi-factor authentication.
section3_desc: The Service is hosted on industry-leading cloud platforms with SOC 2 compliance. We perform regular backups and maintain disaster recovery procedures.
section4_desc: We follow responsible disclosure practices. To report a vulnerability:
section4_items: Include: detailed description, reproduction steps, and impact assessment
Response time: initial acknowledgment within 7 days
Patch target: within 30 days of confirmation
section5_desc: In the event of a security incident, we will notify affected users within 72 hours, investigate the root cause, and implement remediation measures.
